name: Spicy Squid in Wine, Cyprus Style
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Olive oil or corn oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and clean the squid, separating the outer sacs from the heads and tentacles. Remove and discard the translucent cartilage, small sand bag, and ink.
2. Rub salt on the outer sacs and rinse them inside and out with cold water. Rinse the head and tentacles thoroughly.
3. Heat the oil in a pan. Add the squid, including the tentacles, and onions. Cook slowly until the onions are translucent.
4. Pour the vinegar and wine over the squid and onions. Add the remaining ingredients (cinnamon sticks, whole cloves, bay leaf) and enough water to almost cover the squid, if necessary.
5. Cook, uncovered, over low heat until the squid are tender and all the wine has been absorbed, approximately 1 to 1 1/4 hours.
6. Remove the spices and bay leaf.
7. Cut the squid into bite-sized pieces and serve warm or cold.
